g.text: Stage-1+2 LLMs and SapBERT cover ~98–100 % of GSEs, so they sit on the diagonal.

text.style: fill: #64748b; font: 9.5px 'Helvetica Neue', 'Helvetica', 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans'

g.text: Abstention-based systems lift precision above the diagonal at the cost of recall:

text.style: fill: #64748b; font: 9.5px 'Helvetica Neue', 'Helvetica', 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans'

g.text: ensembles (triangles, 2-of-3 majority and all-three-agree intersection) and

text.style: fill: #64748b; font: 9.5px 'Helvetica Neue', 'Helvetica', 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans'

g.text: MetaMuse (diamond). Squares: + BM25 hybrid retrieval. Dashed line: P = R.
